reasoning: Redwire has multiple converging catalysts: UK defense expansion, FCC voting on spectrum modernization that could dramatically increase space-based broadband capacity, and a recent analyst upgrade. As space infrastructure plays like RKLB trade at premium valuations ($70+), RDW at $9.53 represents a potentially mispriced pure-play on in-space manufacturing and defense tech demand.
title: Redwire: The Hidden Picks-and-Shovels Play in the Space Infrastructure Boom
angle: While markets chase launch providers at elevated multiples, Redwire's in-space manufacturing and defense positioning offers asymmetric exposure to the same secular tailwinds at a fraction of the valuation — the FCC spectrum ruling could be an underappreciated catalyst for its payload and satellite component business.
